articles.full_text:
Amritsar: A man covers his baby with a cloth while walking during a hot summer day amid the prevailing heatwave conditions, in Amritsar on Thursday, May 21, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
Amritsar: A man offers drinking water to his baby during a hot summer day amid the prevailing heatwave conditions, in Amritsar on Thursday, May 21, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
